zh.lifeSummary: Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ是Matthieu De Roye III和Jeanne de Vendeuil的女兒，於大約1277年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆洛也。她於1315年與Guillaume V de Béthune結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1349年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯賀斯迪聶爾-利斯-貝圖內享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ是Matthieu De Roye III和Jeanne de Vendeuil的女儿，于大约1277年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆洛也。她于1315年与Guillaume V de Béthune结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1349年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯賀斯迪聶爾-利斯-貝圖內享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: ROYE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Roy   2.
Americanized form of Croatian Roje: from a pet form of Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘generation, family, relatives’, e.g. Rodimir.
Germanized or Americanized form of Sorbian Roj, Rój or Roja (see Roy 4).

variants.name: Roy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Normand, Andre, Jacques, Marcel, Emile, Laurent, Pierre, Cecile, Donat, Gilles.  Indian Dipak, Sumit, Amit, Ajit, Dipankar, Partha, Ranjan, Shyamal, Aloke, Amitava, Chitra, Gautam.
Scottish: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Gaelic ruadh ‘red’. Compare Reed .
English (of Norman origin): from Old French roi ‘king’, used as a nickname (see 3 below) and also as a personal name. Compare Ray 2.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: FERTÉ
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German:
variant of   Fett   or   Fath  .
from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with frid ‘peace’ like Friedrich for example.

variants.name: Fetty
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German   Fette   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Fettig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Mathias, Benno, Helmut, Kurt, Wendelin.
German:
in the north, a patronymic from   Fette  .

variants.name: Fett
meanings: North German: nickname for a fat man, from Middle Low German vett ‘fat’.
English: nickname from Middle English fet(te), fait ‘suitable, becoming, comely’ (Old French fait). Compare Fettes .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms named with Old Norse fit ‘meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ was born about 1277, in Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France as the daughter of Matthieu De Roye III and Jeanne de Vendeuil. She married Guillaume V de Béthune in 1315. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1349, in Hesdigneul-lès-Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ est née environ 1277, à Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, fille de Matthieu De Roye III et Jeanne de Vendeuil. Elle a épousé Guillaume V de Béthune en 1315. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1349, à Hesdigneul-lès-Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ wurde um 1277 in Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich, als Tochter von Matthieu De Roye III und Jeanne de Vendeuil geboren. Sie hat 1315 Guillaume V de Béthune geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1349 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Hesdigneul-lès-Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ è nata il circa 1277 nel Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia come figlia di Matthieu De Roye III e Jeanne de Vendeuil. Lei sposato Guillaume V de Béthune nel 1315. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1349, nel Hesdigneul-lès-Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉは約1277年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメロイでMatthieu De Roye IIIとJeanne de Vendeuilの娘として生まれた。1315年にGuillaume V de Béthuneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1349年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスヘスディグネウル-ルeス-ブeスウンで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ(은)는 대략 1277년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 로예에서 Matthieu De Roye III(와)과 Jeanne de Vendeuil의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1315년 Guillaume V de Béthune(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1349년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 헤즈디그니우-e스-브e툰에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ nasceu aproximadamente 1277, em Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França filha de Matthieu De Roye III e Jeanne de Vendeuil. Ela casou-se com Guillaume V de Béthune em 1315. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1349, em Hesdigneul-lès-Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ родилась около 1277 г. в местности рои, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. Её родителей звали Matthieu De Roye III и Jeanne de Vendeuil. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume V de Béthune в 1315 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1349 г. в местности хесдигнеул-лeс-бeтун, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ nació aproximadamente 1277, en Roye, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia como hija de Matthieu De Roye III y Jeanne de Vendeuil. Se casó con Guillaume V de Béthune en 1315. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1349, en Hesdigneul-lès-Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 74 años.
